CharCoat FP
(4 Hour Fire Rated Panel)
PRODUCT DESCRIPTION AUTHOR SEAN RITCHIE
VERSION 4.0
CharCoat FP Panel is designed to prevent the spread of fire and
PURPOSE/CHANGES DESIGN
smoke through openings in fire rated walls and floors where DATE PUBLISHED JAN 2025
openings are formed to allow the installa(cid:415)on of mul(cid:415)ple building
services. CharCoat FP will also maintain the acous(cid:415)c design
performance in fire rated walls and floors. RESISTANCE TO FIRE
CharCoat FP consists of a high density stone wool core, over- coated Construc(cid:415)on Descrip(cid:415)on Classifica(cid:415)on
with CharCoat CC Cable Coa(cid:415)ng. The top coa(cid:415)ng provides
Flexible walls comprise gypsum, Unlimited width by 1200mm high EI 120 (E 120)
addi(cid:415)onal protec(cid:415)on by significantly reducing the permeability of masonry, aerated concrete or blank seal with double 50mm
the stone wool core and prevents the passage of hot gases, thus concrete CharCoat FP Panel
Rigid walls comprise masonry, Unlimited width by 1200mm high EI 90 (E 240)
reducing the temperature rise on the unexposed side and reducing
aerated concrete or concrete, blank seal with single 60mm
heat conduc(cid:415)on through the building services.
within walls or between the CharCoat FP Panel
head of walls and the soffit of Unlimited width by 1200mm high EI 240 (E 240)
CharCoat FP is available with top coa(cid:415)ng on one or two sides,
floor slabs blank seal with double 60mm
selected on the basis of installa(cid:415)on considera(cid:415)ons and fire CharCoat FP Panel
resistance. On site, CharCoat FP must be used together with Up to 1200 mm by 1200 mm blank EI 240 (E 240)
CharCoat IS for sealing around building services and the seal with double 60mm CharCoat FP
Panel
surrounding construc(cid:415)on.
Rigid floors comprise aerated Up to 1200 mm by 600 mm blank EI 120 (E 240)
concrete or concrete within seal with single 60mm CharCoat FP
floors or between floors and Panel
PROPERTIES
walls Up to 1200 mm by 600 mm blank EI 180 (E 240)
• Up to 4 hours Fire Ra(cid:415)ng seal with double 60mm CharCoat FP
Panel
• Classified for all types of construc(cid:415)ons with or without
Up to 2400 mm by 1200 mm blank EI 90 (E 120)
building service penetra(cid:415)ons
seal with single 60mm CharCoat FP
• Simple and very quick to install Panel
• Easy to retrofit addi(cid:415)onal building services a(cid:332)er installa(cid:415)on Unlimited length by 120mm wide EI 120 (E 240)
• Permanently flexible - will accommodate movements during linear seal with single 60mm
CharCoat FP Panel
fire and smaller movements in the construc(cid:415)on it has been
Please review the installa(cid:415)on instruc(cid:415)ons before applica(cid:415)on.
fi(cid:425)ed within
• Suitable for most surfaces, including concrete, bricks, masonry,
steel, wood, gypsum, glass, plas(cid:415)c and most non-porous SOUND INSULATION
surfaces
Descrip(cid:415)on Sound Reduc(cid:415)on
• May be used in unlimited lengths in walls with heights up to
Single 50mm CharCoat FP Panel 55 dB
1200mm and in floors with widths up to 120 mm
All other configura(cid:415)ons > 55 dB
• May be installed in gypsum walls with or without framing
around the opening CharCoat FP has been tested at BM Trada (UKAS accredited); according to EN ISO
10140-2:2010.
• Halogen free with added fungicides
• Once fully cured, the board resists UV, humidity and frost
• CharCoat FP can be supplied with a smooth surface EMISSION DATA (INDOOR AIR QUALITY)
• Precau(cid:415)ons are required to be taken to prevent a person
Compound Emmisions rate a(cid:332)er 4 weeks
stepping onto a blank horizontal penetra(cid:415)on seal
TVOC 0.20 mg/m(cid:1056)h
• Nearly unlimited storage (cid:415)me
Formaldehyde n.d.
Ammonia n.d.
Carcinogenic n.d.
n.d. or < means not detected

rows: CharCoat FP (4 Hour Fire Rated Panel) PRODUCT DESCRIPTION AUTHOR SEAN RITCHIE VERSION 4.0 CharCoat FP Panel is designed to prevent the spread of fire and PURPOSE/CHANGES DESIGN smoke through openings in fire rated walls and floors where DATE PUBLISHED JAN 2025 openings are formed to allow the installa(cid:415)on of mul(cid:415)ple building services. CharCoat FP will also maintain the acous(cid:415)c design performance in fire rated walls and floors. RESISTANCE TO FIRE CharCoat FP consists of a high density stone wool core, over- coated Construc(cid:415)on Descrip(cid:415)on Classifica(cid:415)on with CharCoat CC Cable Coa(cid:415)ng. The top coa(cid:415)ng provides Flexible walls comprise gypsum, Unlimited width by 1200mm high EI 120 (E 120) addi(cid:415)onal protec(cid:415)on by significantly reducing the permeability of masonry, aerated concrete or blank seal with double 50mm the stone wool core and prevents the passage of hot gases, thus concrete CharCoat FP Panel Rigid walls comprise masonry, Unlimited width by 1200mm high EI 90 (E 240) reducing the temperature rise on the unexposed side and reducing aerated concrete or concrete, blank seal with single 60mm heat conduc(cid:415)on through the building services. within walls or between the CharCoat FP Panel head of walls and the soffit of Unlimited width by 1200mm high EI 240 (E 240) CharCoat FP is available with top coa(cid:415)ng on one or two sides, floor slabs blank seal with double 60mm selected on the basis of installa(cid:415)on considera(cid:415)ons and fire CharCoat FP Panel resistance. On site, CharCoat FP must be used together with Up to 1200 mm by 1200 mm blank EI 240 (E 240) CharCoat IS for sealing around building services and the seal with double 60mm CharCoat FP Panel surrounding construc(cid:415)on. Rigid floors comprise aerated Up to 1200 mm by 600 mm blank EI 120 (E 240) concrete or concrete within seal with single 60mm CharCoat FP floors or between floors and Panel PROPERTIES walls Up to 1200 mm by 600 mm blank EI 180 (E 240) • Up to 4 hours Fire Ra(cid:415)ng seal with double 60mm CharCoat FP Panel • Classified for all types of construc(cid:415)ons with or without Up to 2400 mm by 1200 mm blank EI 90 (E 120) building service penetra(cid:415)ons seal with single 60mm CharCoat FP • Simple and very quick to install Panel • Easy to retrofit addi(cid:415)onal building services a(cid:332)er installa(cid:415)on Unlimited length by 120mm wide EI 120 (E 240) • Permanently flexible - will accommodate movements during linear seal with single 60mm CharCoat FP Panel fire and smaller movements in the construc(cid:415)on it has been Please review the installa(cid:415)on instruc(cid:415)ons before applica(cid:415)on. fi(cid:425)ed within • Suitable for most surfaces, including concrete, bricks, masonry, steel, wood, gypsum, glass, plas(cid:415)c and most non-porous SOUND INSULATION surfaces Descrip(cid:415)on Sound Reduc(cid:415)on • May be used in unlimited lengths in walls with heights up to Single 50mm CharCoat FP Panel 55 dB 1200mm and in floors with widths up to 120 mm All other configura(cid:415)ons > 55 dB • May be installed in gypsum walls with or without framing around the opening CharCoat FP has been tested at BM Trada (UKAS accredited); according to EN ISO 10140-2:2010. • Halogen free with added fungicides • Once fully cured, the board resists UV, humidity and frost • CharCoat FP can be supplied with a smooth surface EMISSION DATA (INDOOR AIR QUALITY) • Precau(cid:415)ons are required to be taken to prevent a person Compound Emmisions rate a(cid:332)er 4 weeks stepping onto a blank horizontal penetra(cid:415)on seal TVOC 0.20 mg/m(cid:1056)h • Nearly unlimited storage (cid:415)me Formaldehyde n.d. Ammonia n.d. Carcinogenic n.d. n.d. or < means not detected
AUTHOR SEAN RITCHIE VERSION 4.0 PURPOSE/CHANGES DESIGN DATE PUBLISHED JAN 2025

pages.text:
CharCoat FP complies with the requirements of BREEAM according No liability can be accepted for the informa(cid:415)on provided in this
to the M1 Protocol for Chemical and Sensory Tes(cid:415)ng of Building document although it is published in good faith and believed to be
Materials as published by RTS version 15.12.2004 which is the best correct. CharCoat Passive Fire Protec(cid:415)on reserves the right to alter
possible environmental and indoor hygiene health protec(cid:415)on mark product specifica(cid:415)ons without prior no(cid:415)ce, in line with Company
for coa(cid:415)ngs. policy of con(cid:415)nuous development and improvement.
TECHNICAL DATA
Condi(cid:415)on Ready for use, pre-coated boards
Density Board: 160 kg/m(cid:1057) (150 – 170 kg/m(cid:1057))
Coa(cid:415)ng: 1.3 – 1.4 kg/ltr
Durability Y(cid:1045) - Intended for use at temperatures below 0°C with
exposure to UV and humidity but no exposure to
rain. Includes lower classes Y(cid:1046), Z(cid:1045) and Z(cid:1046). Up to 30 days
Flash point None
Non-s(cid:415)cky Max. 75 minutes (sealant)
Film forming Max. 25 minutes (sealant)
Totally hardened 3 to 5 days depending on thickness and temperature
Flexibility
Thermal conduct. 0.038 W/mK
Storage 18 months years in dry places with storage temperatures
between 5°C and 35°C
Compa(cid:415)bility Suitable for use with most materials, but should not
be used In direct contact with bituminous materials
Limita(cid:415)ons If the panels are to be used in permanently humid
areas CharCoat CC should be applied over the sealant
Temperature range -30°C to + 80°C (when hardened)
Installa(cid:415)on temp. +5°C to + 50°C
Colour White surface (coa(cid:415)ng), green core (panel)
Packaging CharCoat FP Panel 50x600x1200 mm: 64 pcs per pallet
Warranty 25 Years / Product only. Please refer to our full Terms
and Condi(cid:415)ons of sale.
Suite 301 – 220 Brew Street, Port Moody, BC V3H 0H6 Canada
+1 604 941 1001 mail@CharCoat.com www.CharCoat.com
SALES AND FRANCHISE OFFICES LOCATED IN:
AUSTRALIA/NZ | CENTRAL AMERICA | CHINA | HONG KONG | INDIA | ISRAEL | MALAYSIA | PHILIPPINES | ROMANIA | SAUDI ARABIA | THAILAND | TURKEY | USA

suitable for the intended purpose and applica(cid:415)ons. Therefore,anyliabilityforsuchrecommenda(cid:415)onsoranyoraladviceisexpressly
excludedunlesswehaveactedwillfully orbygrossnegligence.Itisalwaystheresponsibilityoftheinstaller/purchasertoguarantee
correct prepara(cid:415)on, DFT (Charcoat Coa(cid:415)ngs) and thickness (Charcoat Firestop Products) of all Charcoat Passive Fire Protec(cid:415)on
